description: A vertical graphic on a dark navy background. The top shows a line-art house outline containing a shield with a check mark, and a stylized 2025 with the curved label END-OF-YEAR REVIEW. Below, white and gold and light-blue text reads USCIS restored the practice of neighborhood investigations of potential new citizens to verify eligibility and protect the integrity of the naturalization process. The Department of Homeland Security seal and U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services wordmark sit at the bottom left.
notable_text: END-OF-YEAR REVIEW; 2025; USCIS restored the practice of neighborhood investigations of potential new citizens to verify eligibility and protect the integrity of the naturalization process
